creator: jmelo@FreeBSDBrasil.COM.BR
text:
ServerU Inc. (http://www.serveru.us)

We make Server hardware for open source flavors of Unix-like systems. ServerU is a joint effort of FreeBSD specialist company with more than 15 years expertise, and ServerU itself, a US company based on Miami, FL. We focus on designing and making rack-mount 1U networking appliances completely supported by open source Unix-like systems. We make hardware supported and certified for FreeBSD, OpenBSD & Linux. We also focus on ProApps, pfSense, Vyatta (VyOS), Endian and other systems, as well as Juniper, Brocade and other networking products accelerated by Netmap and DPDK technologies. Se offer FreeBSD consulting, support and services on US east cost and Caribbean.
